strengths: Demonstrated consistent instrument control throughout multiple transfer attempts
Maintained steady camera positioning and workspace organization
Showed persistence in attempting multiple transfer strategies
weaknesses: Failed to complete the task within the 300-second time limit
Struggled with efficient mid-air transfer technique
Spent excessive time on individual transfer attempts without adapting strategy

drills.name: Mid-air transfer ladder
drills.description: Practice 12 full transfers without touching the pegboard for support, focusing on smooth hand-to-hand exchanges
drills.targets_weakness: Failed to complete task within time limit due to inefficient transfers

drills.name: Economy-of-motion ladder
drills.description: Perform transfer sequences slowly with minimal wasted regrasping, emphasizing direct pickup and release movements
drills.targets_weakness: Spent excessive time on individual transfer attempts

drills.name: Timed transfer sets
drills.description: Complete 6-object transfer cycles in under 60 seconds, building speed while maintaining control
drills.targets_weakness: Struggled with efficient mid-air transfer technique

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on converting your solid instrument control into faster, more efficient transfer sequences. Work on reducing hesitation between transfers and developing a consistent rhythm to meet time benchmarks.
